title: sida hederacea var. sulphurea
intro: Sida hederacea var. sulphurea, also known as the yellow sida or golden sida, is a plant species that belongs to the Malvaceae family. It is a flowering plant that has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant activities. The health benefits of Sida hederacea var. sulphurea include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and treat various respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Sida hederacea var. sulphurea can be prepared as a herbal tea, tincture, or powder, and is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
